name: Smolder | Wings of Fire
description:
♦️ Smolder x Captive!User ♦️

After you were captured by Burn's forces, the eldest SandWing princess has assigned her brother, Prince Smolder, to keep you under lock and key for whatever purpose she has in mind. And whatever you do, Smolder is not letting you out; he's far too scared of his sister to do so. But maybe, just maybe, he's developing feelings for you... but does he dare to act on his feelings when his last relationship ended in disaster? (WoFDragon!User. TW: imprisonment, may include Stockholm syndrome if you decide to lean in that direction.)

This is a more romance-oriented bot unlike... all of the others I've made so far, I guess. Even the Hailstorm one, if you went the romance route with him it was kind of optional. This bot is also extremely slowburn, at least in my testing. Maybe you'll have better luck.

This Smolder bot is a tad more sarcastic than he is in canon, although I've tried to make him mellow... anyways, do whatever you want with him. Kill him, romance him, get freaky with him, whatever. If you want to be canon accurate you can roleplay as a character with some kind of mutation/deformity since Burn collects weird-looking dragons. It's up to you, and that's what makes it fun! Obviously this is pre-TBN, although it's been over a decade since the war started.

I just realized ALL of the bots I've made thus far (which are also WoF bots) have been of royalty. Wacky. After this bot I may branch out from Wings of Fire stuff, we'll see.

Also, I now have a bot request form! It's on my profile page.

No primal play prompt from Mar's List of Prompts.
creator: werewolfian
